languages.text: Несколько циклов о таинственном храме, найденном Вольным Торговцем в глубине корневой системы Заркова, было ничего не слышно. Но вскоре по планете вновь поползли слухи о безмолвных тенях, выходящих на охоту по ночам и заживо сдирающих со своих жертв кожу.

For several cycles, nothing was heard about the mysterious temple that the Rogue Trader had discovered deep in Zarkov's root system. But soon, rumours of the silent shadows that would creep out at night to hunt and skin their victims alive spread across the planet once more.
languages.original_text: Несколько циклов о таинственном храме, найденном Вольным Торговцем в глубине корневой системы Заркова, было ничего не слышно. Но вскоре по планете вновь поползли слухи о безмолвных тенях, выходящих на охоту по ночам и заживо сдирающих со своих жертв кожу.

traits.locale_text: For several cycles, nothing was heard about the mysterious temple that the Rogue Trader had discovered deep in Zarkov's root system. But soon, rumours of the silent shadows that would creep out at night to hunt and skin their victims alive spread across the planet once more.

For several cycles, nothing was heard about the mysterious temple that the Rogue Trader had discovered deep in Zarkov's root system. But soon, rumours of the silent shadows that would creep out at night to hunt and skin their victims alive spread across the planet once more.

For several cycles, nothing was heard about the mysterious temple that the Rogue Trader had discovered deep in Zarkov's root system. But soon, rumours of the silent shadows that would creep out at night to hunt and skin their victims alive spread across the planet once more.

For several cycles, nothing was heard about the mysterious temple that the Rogue Trader had discovered deep in Zarkov's root system. But soon, rumours of the silent shadows that would creep out at night to hunt and skin their victims alive spread across the planet once more.

languages.text: 数サイクル、ローグトレーダーがザークの根系深くに発見した謎の寺院について、何も聞かれなかった。しかし、夜に忍び寄り生きた獲物を狩り剥ぎ取る影の噂が、再び惑星中に広まった。
languages.original_text: For several cycles, nothing was heard about the mysterious temple that the Rogue Trader had discovered deep in Zarkov's root system. But soon, rumours of the silent shadows that would creep out at night to hunt and skin their victims alive spread across the planet once more.

traits.locale_text: 数サイクル、ローグトレーダーがザークの根系深くに発見した謎の寺院について、何も聞かれなかった。しかし、夜に忍び寄り生きた獲物を狩り剥ぎ取る影の噂が、再び惑星中に広まった。

languages.text: 至于行商浪人在扎尔科夫根系深处发现的那座神秘神庙，它在好几个周期里再无任何消息传出。但不久之后，传闻再次遍布整颗行星——有某种寂静无声的阴影在夜间潜行出没，他们会猎杀活人，再剥下他们的皮肤。
languages.original_text: For several cycles, nothing was heard about the mysterious temple that the Rogue Trader had discovered deep in Zarkov's root system. But soon, rumours of the silent shadows that would creep out at night to hunt and skin their victims alive spread across the planet once more.

traits.locale_text: 至于行商浪人在扎尔科夫根系深处发现的那座神秘神庙，它在好几个周期里再无任何消息传出。但不久之后，传闻再次遍布整颗行星——有某种寂静无声的阴影在夜间潜行出没，他们会猎杀活人，再剥下他们的皮肤。

languages.text: Ce n'est qu'au bout de plusieurs cycles que le mystérieux temple découvert par {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} au cœur du système radiculaire de Zarkov fit enfin parler de lui. Des rumeurs recommencèrent à se répandre sur la planète, évoquant des ombres silencieuses qui rôdaient dans la nuit pour chasser leurs victimes et les écorcher vives.
languages.original_text: For several cycles, nothing was heard about the mysterious temple that the Rogue Trader had discovered deep in Zarkov's root system. But soon, rumours of the silent shadows that would creep out at night to hunt and skin their victims alive spread across the planet once more.

traits.locale_text: Ce n'est qu'au bout de plusieurs cycles que le mystérieux temple découvert par {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} au cœur du système radiculaire de Zarkov fit enfin parler de lui. Des rumeurs recommencèrent à se répandre sur la planète, évoquant des ombres silencieuses qui rôdaient dans la nuit pour chasser leurs victimes et les écorcher vives.

languages.text: Durante varios ciclos, no se supo nada sobre el misterioso templo que descubrió {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente en las profundidades de las raíces de Zarkov. No obstante, no tardaron en surgir rumores por todo el planeta sobre sombras silenciosas que aparecían por la noche para cazar y desollar vivas a sus víctimas.
languages.original_text: For several cycles, nothing was heard about the mysterious temple that the Rogue Trader had discovered deep in Zarkov's root system. But soon, rumours of the silent shadows that would creep out at night to hunt and skin their victims alive spread across the planet once more.

traits.locale_text: Durante varios ciclos, no se supo nada sobre el misterioso templo que descubrió {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente en las profundidades de las raíces de Zarkov. No obstante, no tardaron en surgir rumores por todo el planeta sobre sombras silenciosas que aparecían por la noche para cazar y desollar vivas a sus víctimas.

languages.text: Birkaç döngü boyunca Hür Tacir'in Zarkov'un kök sisteminin derinliklerinde keşfettiği gizemli tapınak hakkında hiçbir şey duyulmadı. Ancak çok geçmeden, geceleri kurbanlarını avlamak ve canlı canlı derilerini yüzmek için sürünen sessiz gölgelerin söylentileri bir kez daha gezegene yayıldı.
languages.original_text: For several cycles, nothing was heard about the mysterious temple that the Rogue Trader had discovered deep in Zarkov's root system. But soon, rumours of the silent shadows that would creep out at night to hunt and skin their victims alive spread across the planet once more.

traits.locale_text: Birkaç döngü boyunca Hür Tacir'in Zarkov'un kök sisteminin derinliklerinde keşfettiği gizemli tapınak hakkında hiçbir şey duyulmadı. Ancak çok geçmeden, geceleri kurbanlarını avlamak ve canlı canlı derilerini yüzmek için sürünen sessiz gölgelerin söylentileri bir kez daha gezegene yayıldı.

languages.text: Mehrere Zyklen lang geriet der geheimnisvolle Tempel, den {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} im Wurzelsystem von Zarkov entdeckt hatte, in Vergessenheit. Allerdings kursierten auf dem gesamten Planeten bald neue Gerüchte über die lautlosen Schatten, die nachts aus ihren Verstecken kriechen, um ihre Opfer bei lebendigem Leib zu häuten.
languages.original_text: For several cycles, nothing was heard about the mysterious temple that the Rogue Trader had discovered deep in Zarkov's root system. But soon, rumours of the silent shadows that would creep out at night to hunt and skin their victims alive spread across the planet once more.

traits.locale_text: Mehrere Zyklen lang geriet der geheimnisvolle Tempel, den {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} im Wurzelsystem von Zarkov entdeckt hatte, in Vergessenheit. Allerdings kursierten auf dem gesamten Planeten bald neue Gerüchte über die lautlosen Schatten, die nachts aus ihren Verstecken kriechen, um ihre Opfer bei lebendigem Leib zu häuten.
